name: Iridium Communications / 铱星通信
summary: Iridium 运营 L-band 低轨卫星通信网络，面向商业、政府、物联网和移动连接市场。相较 SpaceX/Starlink，它是成熟卫星通信运营商的上市样本。
summaryZh: Iridium 运营 L-band 低轨卫星通信网络，面向商业、政府、物联网和移动连接市场。相较 SpaceX/Starlink，它是成熟卫星通信运营商的上市样本。
summaryEn: Iridium operates an L-band LEO satellite communications network serving commercial, government, IoT, and mobile-connectivity markets. Relative to SpaceX/Starlink, it is a mature public satellite-operator benchmark.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日
updateCadence.主营业务: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周
updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.overview: 公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
business.overviewZh: 公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
business.overviewEn: The company provides mobile voice/data, broadband, IoT, government communications, and related engineering services.

segments.name: 商业服务
segments.description: 面向企业、海事、航空、物联网和个人连接需求。
segments.descriptionZh: 面向企业、海事、航空、物联网和个人连接需求。
segments.descriptionEn: Serves enterprise, maritime, aviation, IoT, and personal connectivity demand.

segments.name: 政府服务
segments.description: 向政府客户提供安全移动卫星通信与相关服务。
segments.descriptionZh: 向政府客户提供安全移动卫星通信与相关服务。
segments.descriptionEn: Provides secure mobile satellite communications and related services to government customers.

business.description: 公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides mobile voice/data, broadband, IoT, government communications, and related engineering services.
business.thesis: Iridium 运营 L-band 低轨卫星通信网络，面向商业、政府、物联网和移动连接市场。相较 SpaceX/Starlink，它是成熟卫星通信运营商的上市样本。
business.thesisZh: Iridium 运营 L-band 低轨卫星通信网络，面向商业、政府、物联网和移动连接市场。相较 SpaceX/Starlink，它是成熟卫星通信运营商的上市样本。
business.thesisEn: Iridium operates an L-band LEO satellite communications network serving commercial, government, IoT, and mobile-connectivity markets. Relative to SpaceX/Starlink, it is a mature public satellite-operator benchmark.
riskNotes: 卫星网络维护、终端生态和客户续约会影响收入质量。
SpaceX/Starlink 关系按主题可比处理，不代表直接商业关系。

supplyChain.thesis: Iridium 是卫星运营商，核心上游包括卫星制造/在轨维护、地面网关、用户终端、芯片模组和发射/保险等航天服务。
supplyChain.thesisZh: Iridium 是卫星运营商，核心上游包括卫星制造/在轨维护、地面网关、用户终端、芯片模组和发射/保险等航天服务。
supplyChain.thesisEn: Iridium is a satellite operator; key upstream layers include satellite manufacturing/in-orbit support, ground gateways, user terminals, chip modules, and launch/insurance space services.

entities.name: Iridium Communications / 铱星通信
entities.relationship: 目标公司；公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
entities.relationshipZh: 目标公司；公司提供移动语音/数据、宽带、物联网、政府通信和相关工程服务。
entities.relationshipEn: Target company; The company provides mobile voice/data, broadband, IoT, government communications, and related engineering services.

relationshipStrength.label: 目标公司
relationshipStrength.rationale: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The target company itself, used as the reference point for this supply-chain analysis.

tiers.title: Critical upstream inputs

entities.name: 卫星、发射与地面网络供应链
entities.nameZh: 卫星、发射与地面网络供应链
entities.nameEn: Satellite, launch, and ground-network supply chain
entities.relationship: 支撑卫星平台、入轨服务、地面站/网关、网络运营和服务可用性；具体企业需合同披露后逐项确认。
entities.relationshipZh: 支撑卫星平台、入轨服务、地面站/网关、网络运营和服务可用性；具体企业需合同披露后逐项确认。
entities.relationshipEn: Supports satellite platforms, access to orbit, ground stations/gateways, network operations, and service availability; specific companies should be confirmed contract by contract when disclosed.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in an upstream or supporting-service layer and can affect delivery and cost, but near-term bottleneck attributes need further verification.

entities.name: 终端、天线、射频与通信模组供应链
entities.nameZh: 终端、天线、射频与通信模组供应链
entities.nameEn: Terminal, antenna, RF, and communications-module supply chain
entities.relationship: 终端设备、天线、调制解调器、射频部件和通信芯片模组是连接服务落地的关键投入。
entities.relationshipZh: 终端设备、天线、调制解调器、射频部件和通信芯片模组是连接服务落地的关键投入。
entities.relationshipEn: Terminals, antennas, modems, RF components, and communications chip modules are key inputs for connectivity services.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

companies: 卫星、发射与地面网络供应链

downstream.thesis: Iridium 位于卫星通信服务层，向行业客户、政府客户和终端/模组生态输出连接能力；与 Starlink 相比，它代表窄带/移动/韧性连接的成熟运营商样本。
downstream.thesisZh: Iridium 位于卫星通信服务层，向行业客户、政府客户和终端/模组生态输出连接能力；与 Starlink 相比，它代表窄带/移动/韧性连接的成熟运营商样本。
downstream.thesisEn: Iridium sits in the satellite-communications service layer, selling connectivity to industry customers, government customers, and terminal/module ecosystems; versus Starlink, it represents a mature narrowband/mobile/resilient-connectivity operator benchmark.

tiers.title: Customers and end markets
tiers.notes: 按公司披露的业务场景归类，非完整客户名单。
tiers.notesZh: 按公司披露的业务场景归类，非完整客户名单。
tiers.notesEn: Grouped by disclosed business use cases, not a full customer list.

entities.name: 海事、航空与工业客户
entities.relationship: 在偏远和移动环境购买语音、数据和 IoT 连接。
entities.relationshipZh: 在偏远和移动环境购买语音、数据和 IoT 连接。
entities.relationshipEn: Buy voice, data, and IoT connectivity in remote and mobile environments.

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

entities.name: 政府与应急通信用户
entities.relationship: 使用韧性卫星通信支持安全、应急和任务关键场景。
entities.relationshipZh: 使用韧性卫星通信支持安全、应急和任务关键场景。
entities.relationshipEn: Use resilient satellite communications for secure, emergency, and mission-critical situations.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

tiers.title: SpaceX / Starlink theme link
tiers.notes: 用于 IPO 主题归类，不代表披露的直接商业关系。
tiers.notesZh: 用于 IPO 主题归类，不代表披露的直接商业关系。
tiers.notesEn: Used for IPO-theme classification, not as a disclosed direct commercial relationship.

entities.name: SpaceX / Starlink
entities.relationship: Iridium 与 Starlink 同属卫星连接大赛道，但频段、带宽、终端和客户场景不同。
entities.relationshipZh: Iridium 与 Starlink 同属卫星连接大赛道，但频段、带宽、终端和客户场景不同。
entities.relationshipEn: Iridium and Starlink both belong to satellite connectivity, but differ in spectrum, bandwidth, terminals, and customer use cases.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

financials.latestPeriodZh: 2026 年一季度；年度基准为 FY2025

revenueMix.name: 商业服务
revenueMix.note: 连接服务覆盖海事、航空、物联网和企业用户；分部收入需进一步逐表复核后再入历史图。
revenueMix.noteZh: 连接服务覆盖海事、航空、物联网和企业用户；分部收入需进一步逐表复核后再入历史图。
revenueMix.noteEn: Connectivity services cover maritime, aviation, IoT, and enterprise users; segment revenue should be table-checked before adding historical mix charts.

revenueMix.name: 政府服务
revenueMix.note: 政府通信是成熟卫星运营商的重要下游需求。
revenueMix.noteZh: 政府通信是成熟卫星运营商的重要下游需求。
revenueMix.noteEn: Government communications are an important downstream demand source for a mature satellite operator.

trends.label: 年度净利润
trends.note: 成熟卫星运营商样本，盈利能力明显优于仍在建设期的公司。
trends.noteZh: 成熟卫星运营商样本，盈利能力明显优于仍在建设期的公司。
trends.noteEn: A mature satellite-operator sample with profitability well above buildout-stage peers.

news.title: Iridium 披露 2026 年一季度 10-Q
news.titleZh: Iridium 披露 2026 年一季度 10-Q
news.summary: Q1 2026 收入为 2.19057 亿美元，净利润为 2,159.4 万美元。
news.summaryZh: Q1 2026 收入为 2.19057 亿美元，净利润为 2,159.4 万美元。
news.summaryEn: Q1 2026 revenue was $219.057 million and net income was $21.594 million.
news.impact: 为 Starlink 可比分析提供成熟卫星通信运营商参照。
news.impactZh: 为 Starlink 可比分析提供成熟卫星通信运营商参照。
news.impactEn: Provides a mature satellite-communications operator benchmark for Starlink comparison.

news.summary: FY2025 收入为 8.71659 亿美元，经营现金流为 4.00073 亿美元。
news.summaryZh: FY2025 收入为 8.71659 亿美元，经营现金流为 4.00073 亿美元。

themeExposure.rationale: 低轨卫星通信服务与太空应用相关，但更多是运营服务端暴露，不是关键制造瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 低轨卫星通信服务与太空应用相关，但更多是运营服务端暴露，不是关键制造瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: LEO satellite communications services link to space applications, but exposure is more on the operating-services side than a key manufacturing bottleneck.
